title: Non-record: HyperparamTuned KV2 + FP16 Embed
author: xexyz
quantization: fp16 embeddings (tok_emb export); baseline int8 embeddings

data.description: Reduced key-value heads from 4 to 2 (GQA 8:2) to save parameters and improve throughput.
Lower initial attention sharpness via QK gain initialization set to 1.35.

novel_contributions: Systematic hyperparameter tuning of the baseline 9x512 architecture
Adjusted Muon and scalar learning rates
Exported token embeddings in fp16 instead of int8
Focused on throughput-neutral changes to improve BPB under wallclock constraints
